input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.2.5 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: allowable steering system free play is limited to seven degrees (7°) total measured at the

            CONTENT:

V.3.2.5 Allowable steering system free play is limited to seven degrees (7°) total measured at the 
steering wheel.

final_answer: Allowable steering system free play is limited to seven degrees (7°) total measured at the steering wheel.
